Hero of Kvatch. Tasked with closing gates to a fiery realm while dealing with NPCs who have incredibly awkward, zoomed-in conversations.
The Nerevarine. Washed ashore as an outlander. Spent hours jumping everywhere to level up acrobatics and fighting terrifying cliff racers.
Source Hunter/Godwoken. Engaging in complex turn-based combat where I usually end up accidentally setting my entire party and the surrounding environment on fire.
The Watcher. Capable of reading people's souls and interacting with past lives while exploring a richly written isometric fantasy world. I read a lot of text.
Alien astronaut. Exploring a charming miniature solar system that explodes exactly every 22 minutes. Making the most out of roasted marshmallows and time loops.
Insurance investigator. Boarding an empty ghost ship equipped with a magical pocket watch to determine exactly how 60 crew members met their gruesome ends.
Small boy in a red shirt. Running through a bleak, dystopian facility, avoiding mind-controlled workers, and eventually merging into a giant, fleshy blob.
Silhouette of a young boy. Waking up in a dark, terrifying forest and trying not to be brutally crushed by giant spiders or bear traps.
Suit-wearing time manipulator. Trying to rescue a princess by rewinding my mistakes, only to realize I might actually be the monster.
2D creature in a 3D world. Exploring a pixelated universe by physically rotating the environment 90 degrees to reveal hidden paths and impossible geometry.
Bullet-dodging adventurer. Descending into a dungeon where everything, including the enemies, weapons, and currency, is literally a bullet or a gun.
Mutant scavenger. Fighting through a post-apocalyptic wasteland as a fish with a guitar or a melting alien, trying to reach a legendary seat of power.
Stranded cargo survivor. Fighting escalating hordes of aliens while collecting dozens of bizarre items that stack indefinitely until my attacks cover the entire screen.
Intergalactic explorer. Fleeing Earth's destruction on a broken ship. I beam down to colorful planets to mine ores, build colonies, and capture alien pets.
Independent space pilot. Spending real-time hours hauling cargo across a massive, 1:1 scale Milky Way galaxy, occasionally getting interdicted by pirates.
